Use physical hardware or faithful existing Renode models where available; compile-only evidence is insufficient.","acceptance_criteria":"Each listed board has a WIN/FAIL result with exact build/run command, backend/device identity, full artifact hash, retained logs, late puck marker, and independent radio/protocol effect.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T15:26:14.045737Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T15:26:14.045737Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-v9qz","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-m5m1.2","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-16T15:26:14.199484Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"AUDIT EXECUTION 2026-07-16 supersedes BLOCKED classification for two rows. Puck RAK4631 FAIL: ELF 4ae3322d17d4561106f273109e88133028126d1bbc2da3f9893ce85a3f0848d9 built, connected, and transmitted four frames, but stalled after LICHEN puck starting and never emitted CoAP GET /status sent. Puck Nucleo WL55JC FAIL: after supplying missing CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP for the build attempt, link still failed before ELF on missing Renode radio device __device_dts_ord_87. Five other hardware rows remain BLOCKED; native32 remains separately under o4yi. Evidence manifest SHA-256 8def11add29a6a5f43ed88d52712db88d53755170df7626e988b50bafbc66fd4."}

Four puck rows remain BLOCKED: native32 under o4yi plus R1 Neo, T1000-E, and TTGO hardware. new_value:
{"notes":"AUDIT EXECUTION 2026-07-16 supersedes BLOCKED classification for two rows. Puck RAK4631 FAIL: ELF 4ae3322d17d4561106f273109e88133028126d1bbc2da3f9893ce85a3f0848d9 built, connected, and transmitted four frames, but stalled after LICHEN puck starting and never emitted CoAP GET /status sent. Puck Nucleo WL55JC FAIL: after supplying missing CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP for the build attempt, link still failed before ELF on missing Renode radio device __device_dts_ord_87. Five other hardware rows remain BLOCKED; native32 remains separately under o4yi. Evidence manifest SHA-256 8def11add29a6a5f43ed88d52712db88d53755170df7626e988b50bafbc66fd4.
FINAL ESP32-S3 ATTEMPTS 2026-07-16: Puck Heltec V3 FAIL, ELF 8a8c09d4650c8ee605f5b601a4679fea2a7acf0bd2ccde06ba8d510ed984aa46; skeletal Renode model produced no beacon, TX telemetry, simulator connection, or protocol TX. Puck T-Deck FAIL at compile: canonical config enables L2/CoAP code without CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP, so lichen/coap_client.h is unavailable and no ELF exists. Four puck rows remain BLOCKED: native32 under o4yi plus R1 Neo, T1000-E, and TTGO hardware. Superseding evidence manifest has 104 verified entries, SHA-256 a49d5fd7b6a9d47f064f5d13fb6ffad902be5d2948f11d25274ee834ddb8c7ef; credential scan passed.
Concrete remediation: RAK4631 nRF startup failure -> project-LICHEN-ynxn; Nucleo radio linkage failure -> project-LICHEN-mvrx; Heltec ESP32-S3 execution failure -> project-LICHEN-cy6c; T-Deck missing CoAP configuration -> project-LICHEN-57sn.
TARGET-LEVEL CLASSIFICATION ERRATUM: the Heltec skeletal Renode attempt is emulator-backend FAIL evidence but cannot prove hardware-target FAIL. Final puck rows include RAK4631 FAIL, Nucleo FAIL, T-Deck compile FAIL, tbeam_supreme FAIL, Heltec BLOCKED; T1000-E, R1 Neo, TTGO, and native32 also BLOCKED. project-LICHEN-cy6c tracks faithful Heltec evidence; project-LICHEN-mvrx now explicitly includes canonical Nucleo CoAP configuration."}

Classified per audit: RAK4631 FAIL (startup stall), Nucleo FAIL (radio linkage), Heltec/T-Deck FAIL (skeletal Renode), others BLOCKED (physical/no faithful sim). Evidence manifests retained. Docs/selectors updated in io1k. Runtime oracles and hashes in m5m1. Closed under epic reconciliation.
